% Compile from a workspace containing common/resume.cls: xelatex resume.tex
\documentclass{common/resume}
\begin{document}

\resumeName{\placeholder{name}}
\resumeContact{\placeholder{email} \quad | \quad \placeholder{phone} \quad | \quad \placeholder{linkedin} \quad | \quad \placeholder{location}}

\resumeSection{Summary}
\placeholder{2-3 line role-targeted summary using only resolved facts.}

\resumeSection{Experience}
\datedEntry{\placeholder{title}, \placeholder{company}}{\placeholder{dates}}
\begin{itemize}
  \item \placeholder{Impact bullet with confirmed action, scope, technology, and result.}
  \item \placeholder{Delivery bullet with confirmed ownership and outcome.}
\end{itemize}

\resumeSection{Projects}
\datedEntry{\placeholder{project name}}{\placeholder{dates or blank}}
\begin{itemize}
  \item \placeholder{Project bullet with confirmed stack and user/business/research value.}
\end{itemize}

\resumeSection{Skills}
\placeholder{Languages: ...} \quad \placeholder{Frameworks: ...} \quad \placeholder{Tools: ...}

\resumeSection{Education}
\datedEntry{\placeholder{degree}, \placeholder{institution}}{\placeholder{graduation}}

\end{document}
